page: Microsoft Azure FX24-12mds_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the FXmdsv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 6 physical Intel Xeon 8573C cores, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The processor includes a 260 MB L3 cache, 2 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache. It supports advanced instruction sets such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), and cryptographic acceleration via VAES and SHA-NI.

This server is configured with 504.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 42.0 GB per physical core. It includes 1417 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. No GPUs are bundled with this instance, and it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the FX24-12mds_v2 demonstrates strong single-threaded performance, scoring in the top 10% on Geekbench single-core (2356.0) and Geekbench text processing (3012.0). Single-threaded gzip compression (34.85 GB/sec) and bzip3 decompression (14.47 GB/sec) also rank in the top 25%. Multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics generally fall within the average range, with a Passmark CPU score of 22815.36 and uncached large-block memory read bandwidth of 93.22 GB/sec. For LLM workloads, the server achieves a top-tier text generation speed of 367.67 tokens/sec using a small 135M model, though larger models scale down to average performance tiers.

Given its high memory density of 42.0 GB per core and dedicated CPU allocation, the FX24-12mds_v2 offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound enterprise applications that do not require GPU acceleration. The combination of a high clock-speed Intel Xeon processor, substantial L3 cache, and local storage makes it suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, memory-intensive data processing, software compilation, and text-processing workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure FX24-12mds_v2 is a memory-optimized x86_64 server from the FXmdsv2 family, powered by a dedicated 12-vCPU Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz. It features 504.0 GB of RAM, providing a high density of 42.0 GB per core, alongside 1417 GB of local storage. The processor integrates a 260 MB L3 cache and supports AVX-512 and AMX instruction sets. In performance testing, the instance excels in single-core operations, achieving top-tier results in Geekbench single-core and text processing benchmarks, alongside strong single-threaded compression speeds. Multi-core performance, database operations, and memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. Lacking a GPU, this server is designed for memory-intensive, non-accelerated workloads. It is highly suited for in-memory databases, large-scale text processing, and memory-bound enterprise applications requiring high single-threaded CPU performance.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX24-12mds_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 504 GB of RAM, and 1417 GB of local storage, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-intensive server featuring high single-core performance, massive RAM capacity, and dedicated Intel Xeon processing for enterprise workloads.

504.0 GB of RAM providing 42.0 GB per physical core
1417 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability

Optimized for in-memory databases and memory-intensive enterprise applications
